title: General CS/ML Paper Extraction Schema
description: Fields to extract from a computer science or machine learning paper.

research_question.description: The central research question or problem the paper addresses.

method.description: The primary method, model, or algorithm proposed or studied.

dataset.description: Datasets used for training, evaluation, or experiments. Null if none mentioned.

key_results.description: Main empirical findings, benchmark scores, or theoretical results.

limitations.description: Acknowledged limitations, failure modes, or scope restrictions. Null if not stated.

related_work.description: Key related works or prior approaches the paper explicitly builds on. Null if not discussed.
